summary: Full backend + frontend e2e tested. All 13 pytest backend tests passed. Full user flow (home → school → product → cart → checkout → confirmation with bank info) and admin flow (login success/failure, productos tab with stock/price per size + photo upload, pedidos tab with status dropdown) all work correctly.

issues: RUT displayed as '78.286.443.2' with trailing period instead of Chilean standard '78.286.443-2' (with dash). Matches spec though.

critical_code_review_comments: Stock decrement in POST /api/orders is not atomic - race condition possible if two orders are placed concurrently for same product+size. Consider using findOneAndUpdate with conditional $inc or a transaction.
No email format validation on /auth/login (uses str not EmailStr). Low risk since admin-only.
Image upload allows 5MB+ files with no size limit; could DoS the object storage. Add max file size check.
JWT_SECRET falls back to 'dev-secret' if env var missing - should fail fast in production.
GET /api/files/{path} has no caching headers - every image load hits object storage.
test_credentials: admin@trabalengua.cl / admin123 (seeded on startup, verified working)
seed_data_creation: Created 2 test orders (TEST_Cliente, TEST_Cliente Demo) via checkout flow. Stock decremented on Colegio Baltazar Buzo Completo size 4 (5→3) and Colegio Talca Buzo Completo size L (10→9). Admin-updated Colegio Talca Buzo Completo sizes to stock=10/price=30000 for all sizes via PATCH.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 23 test cases from review request passed. Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py. Admin route is /admin (not /admin/dashboard). Size selector uses data-testid=size-{size}. Checkout inputs use data-testid=checkout-name/whatsapp/email. Admin dashboard Pedidos tab has native HTML select for status.
